title: Universal Tool Stainless Steel Double Ended Carving Spatula Hobby Pottery Tools
description:
The double ended spatula carving tool is constructed of durable stainless steel and makes a great addition to your collection of pottery and hobby tools! At just 6.5 inches in length, these tools are the perfect size for precision work on tiny objects, particularly when working with soft mediums. This carving spatula tool comes with a durable PVC pouch for protection and easy storage while not in use. Each tool features a grip so you'll be able to hold on to it with ease. Make sure to grab this spatula before your next craft or hobby precision project!
